B) Faster in fermentation than aerobic
respiration
C) Equal in fermentation and aerobic
respiration
D) Cannot be compared
14.6 Amphibolic Pathway
94. Which among the following is wrong?
Pg 235, M)
i) Other than glucose, no other
substrates can be used in respiratory
process.
ii) Respiratory pathway is an amphibolic
pathway.
iii) Different substrates enters at
different stage in respiratory
pathway.
A) Only i B) Only iii
C) Only ii D) Both i and ii
95. Which among the following is wrong?
Pg 235, M)
i) Other than glucose, no other
substrates can be used in respiratory
process.
ii) Respiratory pathway is an amphibolic
pathway.
iii) Different substrates enters at
different stage in respiratory
pathway.
A) Only i B) Only iii
C) Only ii D) Both i and ii
96. Fats as a respiratory substrate converts to
which compound first? Pg 235, M)
A) Dihydroxy Aceton Phosphate
B) Glycerol
C) Fatty acid
D) Both B and C
97. Match the following- Pg 235, H)
acids
Phosphate
A) 1-i, 2-iii, 3-ii B) 1-ii, 2-i, 3-iii
C) 1-iii, 2-i, 3-ii D) 1-ii, 2-iii, 3-i
98. Choose the correct according to the correct
sequence (from substrate to end product)
